items.statusDetails: INJ-002: the API must HTML-encode stored user content in its responses so any HTML-rendering consumer (admin/reviewer portal, generated document, email, export) is safe regardless of what sanitization does or doesn't happen at storage time. Got raw, unencoded markup: expected [true] but found [false]

The following asserts failed:
	INJ-005: parameter 'limit' was reflected in the response unencoded. expected [false] but found [true]
INJ-001: user-supplied text should be sanitized/validated before storage — the backend accepted and stored the raw payload byte-for-byte with no transformation. did not expect [] but found []
